Title: TeleJSON: DOM XSS via unsanitised constructor name in `new Function()`
Description: telejson versions prior to 6.0.0 (released 2022) are vulnerable to DOM-based Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) through unsafe deserialisation. Attacker-controlled input from the `_constructor-name_` property in parsed JSON is passed directly to `new Function()` without sanitisation, allowing arbitrary JavaScript execution.
